ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f✝ : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
⊢ ∀ (x y : H),
    { toFun := fun y_1 => ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha (x + y) y_1) f,
        map_add' := ⋯, map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ } =
      { toFun := fun y => ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f,
          map_add' := ⋯, map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ } +
        { toFun := fun y_1 => ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha y y_1) f,
          map_add' := ⋯, map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ }
